title: Pradon
description: A remake of the original random item challenge (RandomItemChallenge) plugin!
body:
Remember [this old plugin](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/random-item-challenge.93602/)?

I've remade it!

Pradon is a new(er) version of the old RandomItemChallenge plugin that hasn't been updated since  2021! 

This remake only introduces a win condition, instantly getting the items (instead of however long it takes for the plugin to give it to you), and makes it so the delay between getting the items is customizable !
